metadata.title: Gary Smith 2023 Vision mapped to GoodReason
metadata.author: Eki Laitila
metadata.purpose: Machine-readable demonstration of transforming a six-part systems engineering vision into an eight-function GoodReason α–Ω systemic model.

soi.name: Gary Smith 2023 future systems engineering vision
soi.description: Six vision statements concerning general human activity systems, heuristic validation, knowledge integration, systemic concepts, SE knowledge architecture and recognition of systems engineering.

mapping.interpretation: Understand and organise the general human activity system through a framework based on general systems theories.

mapping.source_element: Core systemic concepts, drivers, pathologies, processes, principles, methods, tools and wisdom
mapping.interpretation: Provide the axiomatic and conceptual foundation of the systemic method.

mapping.source_element: Input: isomorphism, data, logic, mathematics and environment
mapping.interpretation: Make input, source material, isomorphic structures, measurable relations, logic and environmental information explicit.

mapping.source_element: SE knowledge architecture: ISO 15288, SE Handbook and SEBOK
mapping.interpretation: Treat existing standards and SE knowledge architectures as developmental pressure requiring stronger epistemological organisation.

mapping.source_element: Validation by diverse and numerous heuristic models
mapping.interpretation: Create an organised validation system using heuristic models, cases, comparisons and community review.

mapping.source_element: Output: better solutions, interventions and design value
mapping.interpretation: State what improved solution, intervention, design value or systemic result is produced.

mapping.source_element: Integrate all knowledge systemically / Science 2.0 implementation
mapping.interpretation: Integrate knowledge through technology, AI support, interoperability and modern scientific practice.

mapping.source_element: Recognition of systems engineering as a discipline
mapping.interpretation: Use feedback, learning, legitimacy and disciplinary recognition as long-term developmental outcomes.

collaboration_targets.role: systems science community, feedback and recognition
computational and collaborative modernisation of science
